series_metadata.series_title: Oil and Gas Annual Statement of Producti
series_metadata.series_description: Individual Well listing of oil, gas, and brine produced within a calendar year.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain working copies (diazo duplicates) in office for life of Chapter 1509 O.R.C. Originals (silver masters) forwarded to the Ohio Historical Archives upon creating the working copies ; Paper: Retained for one year, microfilm, then destroy, Microform: Recycle ; Paper: Wastepaper
